Reducing data complexity

Authors

Norah Jones

Bill Gates

Luis Francisco Gomez

Code 
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
library(corrr)
library(tidyheatmaps)

1 Introduction

Pending

2 Import data

Code 
consumer_brand <- read_csv(
  file = "../000_data/008_data_set_chapter-8.csv"
)

3 Transform

Code 
consumer_brand_scale <- consumer_brand |>
  mutate(
    across(
      .cols = perform:rebuy,
      .fns  = \(x) scale(x = x, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[,1]
    )
  )

4 Summarize

Code 
consumer_brand_scale |> 
  skim()

5 Correlation

Code 
correlation_matrix <- consumer_brand_scale |> 
  select(-brand) |> 
  correlate(
    use = "pairwise.complete.obs",
    method = "pearson"
  )

correlation_matrix |> 
  autoplot(
    method = "HC", # hierarchical clustering
    triangular = "lower"
  )

6 Heatmaps

Code 
brand_mean <- consumer_brand_scale |> 
  group_by(brand) |> 
  summarize(
    across(
      .cols = perform:rebuy,
      .fns  = mean
    )
  ) |> 
  ungroup()

brand_mean_longer <- brand_mean |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = perform:rebuy, 
    names_to = "perceptual_adjectives",
    values_to = "value_mean"
  )

tidyheatmap(
  df = brand_mean_longer,
  rows = brand,
  columns = perceptual_adjectives,
  values = value_mean, 
  border_color = "black",
  display_numbers = TRUE,
  fontsize = 12,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  clustering_method = "complete"
)

7 Principal component analysis
